caption: Figure 4.3- Ontario area (in square feet) used to harvest mushrooms over the years.
Figure 4.3- Ontario area (in square feet) used to harvest mushrooms over the years.
description: A line graph titled 'Area Harvested for Mushrooms in Ontario' showing a steady increase from 2016 to 2019. The y-axis represents 'Total Area Harvested (Square Feet)' ranging from 28,000,000 to 35,000,000. The x-axis represents 'Year' from 2016 to 2019.
